hook: OAuth and JWT tokens carry delegated authorization across services and browsers.
cta: Validate issuer, audience, and expiry on every token before granting access.

storyboardBeats.objective: Introduce OAuth as delegated authorization for third-party access.
User consents and authorization server issues an authorization code or token.
JWT payload carries signed claims for subject, audience, and expiry.
Refresh tokens rotate short-lived access without repeating full login.
Resource servers verify signature, issuer, and scope before honoring requests.

narrationPlaceholders.scriptIntent: Introduce OAuth as delegated authorization for third-party access.

transitionToNext.rationale: Authenticated sessions reach APIs through gateway and WAF inspection layers.
